name: outlet-ecommerce-platform
description: Root package for Outlet Ecommerce Platform

scripts.install: bun install:gateway && bun install:custom-gateway && bun install:auth && bun install:email && bun install:user && bun install:product && bun install:admin && bun install:company && bun install:app && bun install:web && echo "All services installed successfully!"
scripts.install:gateway: echo "Installing API Gateway..." && cd api-gateway && bun install
scripts.install:custom-gateway: echo "Installing Custom API Gateway..." && cd custom-api-gateway && bun install
scripts.install:auth: echo "Installing Auth Service..." && cd services/auth-service && bun install
scripts.install:email: echo "Installing Email Service..." && cd services/email-service && bun install
scripts.install:user: echo "Installing User Service..." && cd services/user-service && bun install
scripts.install:product: echo "Installing Product Service..." && cd services/product-service && bun install
scripts.install:admin: echo "Installing Admin Portal..." && cd clients/admin-portal && bun install
scripts.install:company: echo "Installing Company Portal..." && cd clients/company-portal && bun install
scripts.install:app: echo "Installing Outlet App..." && cd clients/outlet-app && bun install
scripts.install:web: echo "Installing Outlet Web..." && cd clients/outlet-web && bun install
